commands.review_summary:
Adds a bundled `capability-manifest-verifier` plugin that verifies HS256 JWT capability manifests, registers a trusted tool policy, and adds tests, labeler metadata, package metadata, and a lockfile importer.

PR surface: Source +407, Tests +234, Docs +13, Config +35, Other +6. Total +695 across 10 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a new feature PR, not a reported current-main bug. The submitted evidence is unit/type/format validation rather than a user-path reproduction.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] This needs maintainer/security judgment on bundling, trusted-policy ownership, dependency approval, and proof rather than an automated repair PR.

target.title: Add capability manifest verifier plugin
target.body:
## Summary
- Add a bundled `capability-manifest-verifier` extension that registers an OpenClaw trusted tool policy.
- Verify broker-issued HS256 JWT capability manifests from env or a configured local path, with secrets kept out of plugin config.
- Map manifest grants to allow, require approval, or deny decisions; unknown tools fail closed by default.
- Add focused tests for signature validation, expiration/agent checks, approval routing, fail-closed behavior, and metadata discovery.

## Safety posture
- No generic tool passthrough or runtime mutation surface is added.
- Secret material is read only from an environment variable and is not emitted in block reasons.
- Invalid, missing, expired, or mismatched manifests block tool calls when the plugin is enabled.
- The bundled plugin is not enabled by default; operators must explicitly enable/configure it.

## Validation
- `pnpm install --frozen-lockfile`
- `OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run extensions/capability-manifest-verifier/index.test.ts src/plugins/contracts/host-hooks.contract.test.ts src/agents/agent-tools.before-tool-call.embedded-mode.test.ts -t "capability-manifest-verifier|trusted|trusted policy"` -> 4 files, 23 passed, 54 skipped
- `node scripts/prepare-extension-package-boundary-artifacts.mjs && pnpm exec tsc -p extensions/capability-manifest-verifier/tsconfig.json --noEmit`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 extensions/capability-manifest-verifier/index.ts extensions/capability-manifest-verifier/index.test.ts extensions/capability-manifest-verifier/src/config.ts extensions/capability-manifest-verifier/src/manifest.ts extensions/capability-manifest-verifier/openclaw.plugin.json extensions/capability-manifest-verifier/package.json extensions/capability-manifest-verifier/tsconfig.json .github/labeler.yml pnpm-lock.yaml`
- `git diff --check HEAD~1..HEAD`

## evaOS linkage
Part of the evaOS capability-manifest verifier sprint tracked from `electricsheephq/evaos-desktop-bridge#143`.
